pr_text:
## Title: Remove AssertFatal from unimplemented E1AP notification function

### Summary
The stub function `e1apCUUP_send_BEARER_CONTEXT_INACTIVITY_NOTIFICATION` unconditionally calls `AssertFatal`, which terminates execution and renders all downstream code paths unreachable. This prevents proper error handling in calling code and makes the function unsafe to call even in non-critical paths. Since this is an unimplemented feature, it should return an error code to allow graceful degradation rathe
